info.title: Microsoft To Do
info.description: Microsoft Graph To Do API connector for managing task lists, tasks, checklist items, and linked resources.

post.description: Sends JSON-RPC requests to invoke Microsoft To Do tools via MCP.

get.description: Get all the task lists in the user's mailbox.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of task lists to return

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression

post.description: Create a new task list in the user's mailbox.

get.description: Read the properties of a specific task list.

parameters.name: todoTaskListId
parameters.description: The ID of the task list

parameters.name: todoTaskListId
parameters.description: The ID of the task list

parameters.description: The ID of the task list

parameters.description: Properties to include in response

get.description: Get tasks that have been added, deleted, or updated in a task list since the last sync.

parameters.name: todoTaskListId
parameters.description: The ID of the task list

parameters.name: $deltatoken
parameters.description: State token from previous delta call to get incremental changes

parameters.name: $skiptoken
parameters.description: State token for pagination within a delta result set

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Number of tasks to return per page

get.description: Get task lists that have been added, deleted, or updated since the last sync.

get.description: Get all the categories defined for the user. Categories can be used to tag tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the task list

displayName.description: The name of the task list

isOwner.description: True if the user is owner of the task list

isShared.description: True if the task list is shared with other users

wellknownListName.description: Property indicating the list name if the given list is a well-known list

displayName.description: The name of the task list
The new name of the task list

dateTime.description: A date and time in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2024-12-31T23:59:00.0000000)

timeZone.description: The time zone (e.g., UTC, Pacific Standard Time)

interval.description: The number of units between occurrences

daysOfWeek.description: Days of the week for the recurrence

dayOfMonth.description: The day of the month for the recurrence

firstDayOfWeek.description: The first day of the week

index.description: The week index for relativeMonthly/relativeYearly patterns

startDate.description: The start date of the recurrence (yyyy-MM-dd)

endDate.description: The end date of the recurrence (yyyy-MM-dd)

numberOfOccurrences.description: The number of times to repeat the task

recurrenceTimeZone.description: The time zone for the start and end dates

title.description: A brief description of the task

status.description: The state or progress of the task

isReminderOn.description: Set to true if an alert is set to remind the user

hasAttachments.description: Indicates whether the task has attachments

categories.description: The categories associated with the task

createdDateTime.description: The date and time when the task was created

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time when the task was last modified

bodyLastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time when the task body was last modified

title.description: A brief description of the task

status.description: The state or progress of the task

isReminderOn.description: Set to true if an alert is set to remind the user

id.description: Server generated ID for the checklist item

displayName.description: The title of the checklist item

isChecked.description: State that indicates whether the item is checked off or not

checkedDateTime.description: The date and time when the item was finished

createdDateTime.description: The date and time when the item was created

displayName.description: The title of the checklist item

isChecked.description: Set to true to mark the item as checked

displayName.description: The title of the checklist item

isChecked.description: State that indicates whether the item is checked off or not

id.description: Server generated ID for the linked resource

applicationName.description: The app name of the source that sends the linked resource

displayName.description: The title of the linked resource

externalId.description: ID of the object associated with this task on the third-party system

webUrl.description: Deep link to the linked resource

@odata.type.description: The OData type of the attachment

name.description: The display name of the attachment

contentType.description: The MIME type of the attachment

contentBytes.description: The base64-encoded contents of the file

size.description: The size in bytes of the attachment

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time when the attachment was last modified

name.description: The name of the file (e.g., report.pdf)

contentBytes.description: The base64-encoded contents of the file

@odata.nextLink.description: URL to get the next page of changes (contains skipToken)

@odata.deltaLink.description: URL to get future changes (contains deltaToken). Save this for the next sync.
